item.name: Drunkfish
item.description:
If you had a face like this, you'd look sad, too.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: It is said that love is the primary nature of the Twelve, but that was not so when a blasphemous drunkard fell into Galadion Bay. He was cursed to live as a fish with a head retaining his own ale-sodden face. Rather than hide his shame, the drunkfish is known to lure sailors into the water, swimming to the surface knowing full well they will mistake him for a crewmate fallen overboard.
